docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PERFORMANCE PRINTING CENTER, INC. ECHO, WALTER AS TO DEFENDANT SHORE, YOUNG & TOMI, INC. YOUNG, STEVE : PRESIDENT & OWNER STOWER, CAROL: VICE-PRESIDENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

ECHO, WALTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHORE, YOUNG & TOMI, INC. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHORE, YOUNG & TOMI, INC.
